response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished full-stack developer with strong architectural thinking and mentoring skills, the role requires specialized expertise in C++, industrial automation, and industrial cybersecurity standards. His last significant C++ work was over a decade ago, and he has no demonstrated experience in IoT, industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, etc.), or IEC 62443 compliance frameworks—all central to this position. His career has moved toward web development, cloud platforms, and full-stack engineering, not embedded systems or industrial domains.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (19+ years) with strong architectural thinking and design pattern expertise demonstrated across multiple roles
Proven full-stack mastery with React, Node.js, TypeScript, and deep commitment to testing, TDD, and code quality standards
Excellent communication, mentoring, and technical documentation skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and ability to lead diverse technical teams
concerns: Critical gap: No C++ experience for 10+ years (last significant work 2014-2015); role explicitly requires C++ as core competency for hands-on development
No industrial automation, IoT, or embedded systems background; no experience with required protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, IEC 104, DNP 3.0, OPC UA)
No demonstrated knowledge of Secure Development Lifecycle practices, IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards, or secure coding for industrial systems

key_factors.factor: Strong behavioral competencies and mentoring skills
